descriptor.description: Unified assistant module with streaming chat, transcript persistence, service-aware tool execution, and workspace UI.

ai-api-key.promptHint: Leave empty to keep assistant disabled until you add a key.

ai-timeout-ms.promptHint: Abort AI requests after this many milliseconds.

surfaces.promptHint: Comma-separated workspace surface ids for assistant page + menu placement (for example: admin,app).

descriptor.description: Auth web module: Fastify auth routes plus web login/sign-out scaffolds.

surfaces.summary: Exports auth web client provider, default auth views, and route/provider registration surface.
Exports auth web server providers, controller/service classes, route builders, and HTTP schema modules.

routes.summary: Log in with configured credentials

Verify one-time email login code and create session
Log out and clear session cookies

Complete password recovery link exchange
Set a new password for authenticated recovery session
Register a new user
Get current session status and CSRF token

descriptor.description: Shared CRUD helpers used by CRUD modules.
CRUD server generator with routes, actions, and persistence scaffolding.

surface.promptHint: Must match an enabled surface id.

directory-prefix.promptHint: Optional subpath prepended to the CRUD route path (example: crm or ops/team-a).

table-name.promptHint: Required existing MySQL table to introspect for CRUD schema generation.

id-column.promptHint: Primary key column used by CRUD endpoints (default: id).

surfaces.summary: Scaffold package runtime provider (no-op) plus reference CRUD server modules.
Exports shared CRUD resource and module config helpers.

descriptor.description: Generate app-local CRUD UI scaffolds from resource validators.

surface.promptHint: Must match an enabled surface id.

resource-file.promptHint: Relative path from app root to the resource module.

operations.promptHint: Required comma-separated values from: list, view, new, edit.

display-fields.promptHint: Optional comma-separated field keys to render (must exist in selected operation schemas).

api-path.promptHint: Base API path without trailing id (defaults to /<namespace>, example: /contacts).

route-path.promptHint: List route path under the target surface (defaults to <namespace>, example: contacts).

container.promptHint: Optional container host slug (example: practice). Routes are generated under this prefix and list menu placement defaults to <container>:sub-pages.

id-param.promptHint: Route param used by view and edit pages (default: recordId).

directory-prefix.promptHint: Optional subpath under the selected surface pages root (example: crm or ops/team-a).

placement.promptHint: Optional host:position target (defaults to ShellLayout default outlet).

surfaces.summary: Builds deterministic template context values from selected resource operation validators.

files.reason: Install generated list page.
Install generated view page.
Install generated new page.
Install generated edit page.
